title: cyclobalanopsis chingsiensis
intro: Cyclobalanopsis chingsiensis, also known as the Ching's oak, is a species of deciduous tree in the Fagaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis chingsiensis include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
